_publications._publicationTitle: Sex Is a major determinant of neuronal dysfunction in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: only Nf1-CKO male mice showed no spatial preference and spent equal time in all quadrants (Fig 3A, B) during both the memory acquisition (probe trial 1) and retention (probe trial 2) trials
details: Only Nf1-CKO male mice showed no spatial preference and spent equal time in all quadrants during memory acquisition and retention trials
